title: [release-1.42] tests: use cached images instead of fedoraproject.org
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Image replacements:                                                                                                                                                                                             
- `fedora-minimal` -> `testimage:20241011` (label tests in bud.bats, config.bats)                                                                                                                                
- `fedora-minimal` -> `alpine:3.10.2` (blobcache.bats)                                                                                                                                                           
- `fedora-minimal` -> `ubuntu:latest` (conformance test)                                                                                                                                                         
- Removed `fedora-minimal` registrypair from registries.bats (short-name resolution is still tested via busybox/docker.io pairs; adding a quay.io pair would require custom registries.conf) 

#### How to verify it
 Run the affected tests:`sudo bats tests/config.bats tests/bud.bats tests/registries.bats`

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:
Fixes #6492 

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

Cherry-picked from #6634.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
